ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted into the NBA */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "nba_debut" TEXT /* Date of the player's NBA debut */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Boston Celtics) */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., BOS) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team plays in (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home arena */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie contract, max contract) */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Contract start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Contract end date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game where statistics were recorded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team's ID */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team's ID */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, preseason) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "coaching_experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience of the coach */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistics record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the statistics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team across all games */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in their conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in their division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the engagement */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Fan Day, Meet and Greet) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., fan day, meet and greet) */,
  "engagement_metric" INTEGER /* Metric for measuring fan engagement (e.g., social media mentions, merchandise sales) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the salary */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "salary_cap_impact" REAL /* Impact of the salary on the team's salary cap */,
  "luxury_tax" REAL /* Amount of luxury tax paid by the team due to the player's salary */,
  "date_effective" TEXT /* Date when the salary becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, All-Star selection) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., NBA championship, division title) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick record */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year of the draft */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the pick */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was drafted */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that made the pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that made the trade */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was traded */,
  "traded_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that received the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_traded_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "free_agents" (
  "free_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each free agent record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is a free agent */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Contract status of the player (e.g., unrestricted, restricted) */,
  "interested_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that is interested in signing the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("free_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_free_agents_interested_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("interested_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
